note: Where VC allocates signals where academic tools leave unsolved problems. Startups are a 2–3 year leading indicator ahead of consulting frameworks.
coverage: US + EU/UK = rich signal. China, India, Israel, and South Korea RAI startup visibility is thin — most activity lives inside large enterprises.

domains.unsolved: Prompt injection, jailbreaks, hallucination at scale
domains.examples: Lakera AI · Patronus AI · Guardrails AI

domains.unsolved: Production drift, data quality, unexplained behavior
domains.examples: Arthur AI · WhyLabs · Galileo AI · Fiddler AI

domains.unsolved: EU AI Act / NIST RMF audit trails, policy-to-code gap
Model theft, adversarial inputs, supply chain integrity
domains.examples: Protect AI · Hidden Layer · Robust Intelligence

domains.unsolved: Federated learning, synthetic data at inference time
Hiring, lending, credit — automated bias detection
